title: IT1 - Total reportable fringe benefits amounts 2012

Did you receive any reportable fringe benefits amount?

If an amount shown on your payment summary is less than $3,738, do not include it. Check with your employer that the amount is correct.
Write the total at W item IT1 . If your total is less than $3,738, leave W blank. Go to question IT2 .

content_text:
This question is about reportable fringe benefits amounts that you received. Do not show an amount less than $3,738.
## Did you receive any reportable fringe benefits amount?
NO | Go to question IT2 - Reportable employer superannuation contributions , or return to main menu Individual tax return instructions
YES | Read on.
## Answering this question
You will need every PAYG payment summary - individual non-business and every PAYG payment summary - foreign employment you received that shows reportable fringe benefits amounts.
## Completing your tax return
### Step 1
Add up the reportable fringe benefits amounts shown on your payment summaries.
If an amount shown on your payment summary is less than $3,738, do not include it. Check with your employer that the amount is correct.
### Step 2
Write the total at W item IT1 . If your total is less than $3,738, leave W blank. Go to question IT2 .
Where to go next go to IT2 - Reportable employer superannuation contributions return to main menu Individual tax return instructions go back to Income tests
